# Sell or Buy a Business with a Genuine Business Advisor
[ Schedule a Consultation ](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/contact-us/)
## Boston-Based M&A Firm & Business Brokerage
Whether selling or buying a business, having a dedicated and experienced team makes a vital difference.
Selling or transitioning a business isn’t just about spreadsheets; it’s about people. We guide our clients through a unique process that is designed to provide the best outcome for you and your family.
Have you heard it takes 1-3 years to sell a business? Not necessarily if you have the right team.
![Selling a business icon](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/selling-icon-1-150x150.png)
#### Selling a Business?
When it’s time to sell your business, you need a team to maximize value and find the perfect buyer. Our sell-side experts will meticulously market your business for sale, identify qualified buyers, and skillfully negotiate to ensure you receive the best possible outcome for your years of hard work.
[ Start Here ](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/sell-side-services)
![](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/buying-icon-150x150.png)
#### Buying a Business?
Looking to expand your business through acquisition? Our buy-side services help you identify the perfect opportunities and negotiate favorable terms. We will be by your side every step, ensuring that your investment aligns with your strategic goals and vision for growth.
[ Start Here ](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/buy-side-services)
![](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/financing-icon-150x150.png)
#### Additional Services
There are many moving parts when selling or buying a business. Having the right partner to handle every little detail is crucial to a successful venture. We offer a full range of services for both sellers & buyers, from business valuations, to book keeping cleanup, to lending, to life after sale of business consultation.
[ See Our Services ](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/services)
![](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/GBA-Services-page-position-1--1024x683.jpg)
## Business Consulting
Success in today’s dynamic business environment requires strategic thinking and expert guidance. Our consulting services draw on our vast industry experience to help you optimize operations, improve profitability, and position your business for long-term success. From strategic planning to operational improvements, we are here to help your business reach its full potential.
[ Get Started  ](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/contact-us)
##### Why Choose GBA?
[ See the GBA Difference ](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/why-us)
### Client Testimonials
“GBA was instrumental in advising me on my first business purchase and has subsequently helped me with all my business needs. John continually provides guidance, information and a strategic perspective that is essential for business growth. John and his team are very friendly, knowledgeable, and timely. If you want to be successful in business, I highly recommend GBA for all your business needs!”
![](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/GBA-Testimonial-Julie-Freitas-scaled.jpg)
Julie Freitas
Owner, Planted Donuts, Retailer
“John represented our firm during our search for and negotiation with potential buyers of our firm. He introduced us to numerous highly qualified acquisition candidates and skillfully guided our company through the marketing, due diligence, and sales process. I enthusiastically recommend John and I would engage him for any business purchase/sale transaction that we may consider in the future.”
![](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/GBA-Client-Testimonial-Ken-McGovern.jpg)
Ken McGovern
President, KMR Executive Search LLC
"Genuine Business Advisors, led by Angela and John, were crucial to getting my dental practice acquisition completed. They guided me through the process and emphasized key points of interest for my practice. Their broad range of connections—from marketing to payroll—proved invaluable. More importantly, they educated me in various business topics that will benefit me for the rest of my career as I continue to build out my dental and personal businesses."
![](https://www.genuinebusinessadvisors.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Dr-Stanley-Chan.jpg)
Dr Stanley Chan
Owner, Dental Practice, RI
I recently sold my dental practice after 45 years and used Genuine Business Advisors for the entire process. When I made the decision to sell my business, I knew ﬁnding the right partner would be crucial to the success of the process. From the very ﬁrst conversation, GBO demonstrated profound expertise and genuine professionalism at every stage. Their team took the time to understand both my goals and the unique qualities of my business, which gave me great conﬁdence and peace of mind. Throughout the entire journey, they communicated transparently, offered insightful advice, and navigated complex negotiations with remarkable skill. Their dedication to achieving the best possible outcome was evident from day one, and they consistently prioritized my interests. Thanks to their strategic approach and tireless effort, the transition was seamless and exceeded my expectations. What truly set them apart was their commitment to building trust and providing personalized support, making a potentially stressful process feel manageable and even rewarding. I am deeply grateful for their guidance and professionalism, and I wholeheartedly recommend their services to anyone considering selling a business. Their expertise, integrity, and care made all the difference—I could not have asked for a better partner for this pivotal moment. 
Dr Edward B Kaiser
Owner, Oaklawn Family Dental Associates, RI

### AdvisorAssist focuses exclusively on serving investment advisory firms.
AdvisorAssist provides comprehensive, turnkey solutions for both new and transitioning advisors as well as established registered investment advisor (“RIA”) firms. As a national leader in RIA registration, transition, and compliance support services, AdvisorAssist provides actionable advice and execution to advisors to launch and protect their advisory firms. From concept through launch, we partner with advisors to assist in building world-class advisory practices. For established firms, we provide the ongoing compliance, risk management and strategic support that enables advisors to focus on growing their practice.
Our proven capabilities, unparalleled delivery and world-class technology make us the optimal partner to help you plan, launch and and protect your advisory firm.
[Learn more about The AdvisorAssist Difference](https://advisorassist.com/our-firm/the-advisorassist-difference/)
![](https://advisorassist.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/06/icon-growing-plant.png)
### Starting an RIA?
We will guide you every step of the way in launching your new RIA firm. Leverage our decades of experience to get your new firm established quickly and correctly.
[Learn More](https://advisorassist.com/ria-services/ria-registration/ria-registration-overview/)
![](https://advisorassist.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/06/icon-shield.png)
### Need transition support?
Are you looking to break away from the traditional wirehouse or broker dealer model? We can guide you from the initial planning stages to execution of your transition to a new RIA firm.
[Learn More](https://advisorassist.com/ria-services/ria-transitions/complete-transition-support/)
![](https://advisorassist.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/06/icon-life-preserver.png)
### Compliance Support?
**Stay ahead of the regulatory curve.** We provide comprehensive compliance support programs to guide and support your firm through the maze of regulatory requirements.
[Learn More](https://advisorassist.com/ria-services/ria-compliance/)
![](https://advisorassist.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/06/icon-blue-target.png)
### Ready for an Audit?
**Are you prepared?** Our on-site or remote mock examination services take comprehensive review of your RIA firm to help ensure that you are fully prepared for an SEC or State audit.
[Learn More](https://advisorassist.com/ria-services/ria-compliance/mock-exams-and-assessments/)
### About AdvisorAssist
About AdvisorAssist
### AdvisorAssist. Where Advisors _turn_ for Advice.
AdvisorAssist the leading consulting firm supporting registered investment advisors. Through consultative services and outsourcing, AdvisorAssist provides expertise, resources and actionable solutions that enable investment advisors to achieve their full potential.
**We are not your typical consulting firm.**
We deliver practical, actionable advice and solutions that are specific to your unique situation and business model by bringing together the three critical components of your advisory practice:  
**People, Process and Technology.**
As your partner, we will ensure that you receive the personal attention and service that you expect and deserve. Our sole objective will be to help you build an institutional-quality franchise that will expand your growth opportunities, protect your franchise and improve your efficiency and scalability.
[Learn More](https://advisorassist.com/our-firm/about-us/)
The AdvisorAssist Difference
We bring real-world entrepreneurial experience to our client relationships and provide guidance from initial setup to ongoing strategic, operational and regulatory support. Our appreciation for the “business of our business” comes from our years of experience in establishing and running investment advisory businesses. Our Principals have held leadership positions on the front lines of every functional area of the investment firm.
[Learn More](https://advisorassist.com/our-firm/the-advisorassist-difference/)
An Integrated Approach
The AdvisorAssist team has “real world” experience in establishing, running and auditing investment advisory businesses. We have a deep appreciation not only for the parts but for the whole.
This functional breadth allows us to engage clients in a unique, integrated manner. By viewing each business issue through multiple lenses, we deliver better solutions to our clients. For instance, when a client asks us to tackle an operational project, they know that we do so with the “big picture” in mind (always mindful of potential opportunities or limitations rooted in operations, technology, compliance or strategy).
Our clients benefit from this integrated approach by eliminating the risk and coordination costs that come from engaging multiple functional specialists.
[Learn More](https://advisorassist.com/our-firm/an-integrated-approach/)
What We Do For Whom
AdvisorAssist provides customized solutions for independent RIA’s, asset managers and hedge funds. Our sole objective is to help our clients build, grow, protect and optimize their practices.
[Learn More](https://advisorassist.com/our-firm/an-integrated-approach/)
